data.title: SAS aims AI agents at industry's toughest challenges
data.description: SAS announces its industry accelerators are enhancing competitiveness across various sectors, from finance to manufacturing. The lack of sector-specific AI talent is identified as a barrier to success for many businesses. The announcement was made at SAS Innovate event in Dallas on April 28, 2026.

data.title: Surgical Information Systems Appoints Division Presidents to Lead Software and Revenue Cycle Management Growth
data.description: A recent announcement states that Surgical Information Systems (SIS) based in Alpharetta, Georgia, introduced a new leadership structure on April 28, 2026. This change aims to enhance their emphasis on healthcare software innovation and revenue cycle management services specifically designed for ambulatory surgery centers. The company is recognized as a top provider in the industry.

data.title: FuturHealth Among the First to Offer Eli Lilly's Oral GLP-1, Orforglipron, Expanding Access to Next-Generation, Non-Injectable Treatment
data.description: FuturHealth, a clinically-guided health platform focusing on long-term health beyond weight loss, has introduced a new once-daily pill for its customers. Available through the platform, this pill can now be conveniently delivered to homes. This development was revealed on April 28, 2026. FuturHealth's expansion includes offering a wider range of care options to enhance the health support provided.

data.title: National Safety Council and Wolters Kluwer Enablon Report Finds Adoption of AI Growing Rapidly Among EHS Professionals
data.description: Ninety percent of safety professionals support the integration of artificial intelligence (AI) into workplace safety measures, emphasizing the importance of establishing clear guidelines. This cautious yet enthusiastic approach to AI implementation was highlighted in Washington on April 28, 2026. The growing trend of incorporating AI into safety programs is gaining momentum, underscoring the need for defined protocols to ensure its effectiveness.

data.title: Leading Edge Materials reveals outcomes of the yearly shareholder meeting.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the global economy is experiencing a slowdown, with a growth rate of only 2.5% projected for this year, down from the initial forecast of 3.2%. The manufacturing sector is particularly affected, with a decrease in output by 1.7%. Additionally, global trade is expected to suffer a decline of 2.6%, marking a significant decrease from the previous estimate of 2.5% growth. These factors are contributing to an increase in global unemployment rates, which are expected to rise by 0.1% to reach 5.6%. Despite these challenges, certain regions are still showing resilience, with emerging markets in Asia projected to grow by 4.5% and Latin America by 1.8%.  Overall, these numbers indicate a concerning trend in the global economy, highlighting the importance of implementing measures to stimulate growth and mitigate the impact of current economic challenges.

data.title: FIRST FINANCIAL ANNOUNCES BOARD ELECTION AND INCREASED DIVIDEND AT ANNUAL MEETING
data.description: In Abilene, Texas on April 28, 2026, First Financial Bankshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIN) announced a $0.22 per share cash dividend for the second quarter in correlation with the 2026 Annual Shareholders' Meeting.

data.title: Bioretec Ltd - Manager's transactions - Stephen Industries Inc Oy
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Bioretec Oy announced important managers' transactions at 16:55 EEST. Stephen Industries Inc Oy, a key player, was identified by the notification requirement. The disclosed information is critical for investors and stakeholders to track the movements and decisions within Bioretec Oy. This update sheds light on the key individuals and their roles within the company, ensuring transparency and accountability.

data.title: Drip Capital Surpasses $9 Billion in Trade Transactions as SMBs Navigate Shifting Global Supply Chains
data.description: Drip Capital, a global fintech company headquartered in Palo Alto, California, announced its goal to achieve a 25% growth in business volumes by 2027. The company has successfully executed over $9 billion in trade finance transactions since its establishment. Specializing in trade finance solutions and B2B commerce infrastructure, Drip Capital continues to expand its operations with a focus on increasing its transaction volumes in the coming years.

data.title: Keystone Lands Technology-Forward Industry Leaders for its Board of Directors
data.description: Michael D. Penner and Michael Rhodes have joined Keystone, a top global technology advisory firm, bringing strong technology and business transformation skills. Their arrival coincides with Keystone's AI proficiency, presenting significant opportunities. The news was announced on April 28, 2026 in New York.

data.title: CIRM Awards AcuraStem $7.5 Million in Grant Funding to Advance AS-241 Toward a First-in-Human Trial for ALS and FTD
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Pasadena, California, AcuraStem, a biotech company focusing on developing therapies for amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) and frontotemporal dementia (FTD) among other neurodegenerative diseases, revealed a significant update. They shared that the California Institute for Regenerative Medicine has taken a crucial step in supporting their research efforts.

data.title: Eightpoint CEO, Deniz Gezgin Accepted into Fast Company Executive Board
data.description: The Fast Company Executive Board is an exclusive group of influential individuals who are driving innovation, technology, and design in the business world. On April 28, 2026, in George Town, Cayman Islands, Deniz Gezgin, the Chief Executive Officer of Eightpoint, a digital product company, announced important developments within the organization.

data.title: AccountTECH Report Delivers Critical Equity-Defense Strategy to Protect Brokerage Valuation
data.description: A recent whitepaper has exposed the negative impacts of relying on spreadsheets for financial operations in multi-entity real estate brokerages. The report highlights that such dependence leads to substantial valuation discounts and heightened deal risk. The study was conducted by AccountTECH, a prominent provider of financial back-office solutions within the real estate sector. This revelation was shared in Boston on April 28, 2026. This finding suggests the importance for real estate brokerages to adopt more advanced financial management tools to avoid these negative consequences.

data.title: Amasian TV Rolls Out to 250,000+ Premium Hotel Rooms Across the U.S.
data.description: A new streaming service has been launched, offering a login-free experience specifically designed for hotel guests. This service is now available at 4- and 5-star hotels in prominent U.S. urban areas. On average, there is a significant increase of 12 times in viewership per room each month. This initiative aims to provide a tailored and amplified viewing experience for guests staying at these upscale hotels.

data.title: ACLS Welcomes Five Scholarly Associations to Its Federation of Member Societies
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in New York, the American Council of Learned Societies (ACLS) introduced five new members to its network of professional academic practitioners. The ACLS is renowned for promoting the development and dissemination of knowledge in the humanities and social sciences.

data.title: LeanDNA Named 2026 "Partner in Collaborative Innovation" by Manufacturing Leadership Council
data.description: In Austin, Texas on April 28, 2026, LeanDNA earned accolades in the Digital Supply Chain sector for their collaboration with Husky Technologies. The company, renowned for its advanced supply chain execution platform, has been commended for the fourth consecutive year as a 2026 Partner in Collaborative efforts.
